sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section V, List of Answers on Topics 151:1

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section V, List of Answers on Topics 151:1
items.html: ZON of the vessel of Hochma of SAG were emanated by the inversion of the anterior of the vessel of Keter. They are considered the phase of VAK of ZON of Keter. However, any illumination of GAR in Partzuf Bina comes from these ZON, which is because of the record of the light of Bina that remained in the vessel of Hochma from the time of the second expansion. The value of these ZON of Hochma is similar to the value of ZON of Bina of Partzuf AB. (Inner Light, Item‎ 47)
